title: 20 Years After Miracle Borewell Rescue in Kurukshetra, Here's How Prince Looks Now | WATCH
description: Twenty years ago, the public of India prayed for the safety of a four-year old boy named Prince who had fallen into a borewell in Kurukshetra, Haryana. Two decades on, a heartwarming video has surfaced of the boy all grown up, now harbouring dreams of pursuing higher education.
